name: Family Lockup
overview: In a bold bid to break the cycle of recidivism, Sheriff Nick Cocchi of the Hampden County Sheriff's Office in Massachusetts, is allowing estranged family members to spend two nights in jail to restore broken family bonds but when the cell doors close, will healing begin or will some inmates find themselves facing reintegration alone?

trailers.title: New Series "Family Lockup" Premieres Thursday, August 21 at 10pm ET/PT
